modules.name: Core HTTP
modules.description: Conn struct, HTTP parser, TCP server, and response helpers

modules.name: Router DSL
modules.description: Macro-based routing DSL with dynamic routes, scopes, resources, and path helpers

modules.name: Cowboy Adapter
modules.description: Bridges Cowboy HTTP server to Ignite's Conn-based pipeline

modules.name: LiveView
modules.description: Real-time server-rendered views over WebSocket with diffing engine, streams, components, and uploads

modules.name: PubSub & Presence
modules.description: Cross-process messaging via Erlang :pg and presence tracking via Process.monitor

modules.name: Security
modules.description: CSRF protection, CSP headers, HSTS, SSL/TLS configuration, and signed cookie sessions

modules.name: OTP & Supervision
modules.description: Application supervisor, rate limiter GenServer, and hot code reloader

modules.name: Persistence
modules.description: Ecto integration with SQLite, schemas, changesets, and migrations

modules.name: Frontend JS
modules.description: WebSocket client, event delegation, morphdom DOM patching, JS hooks

modules.name: Static Assets
modules.description: ETS-based content-hashing manifest for cache-busting URLs

modules.name: DevTools
modules.description: Debug error page, hot code reloader, mix tasks, logger metadata

modules.name: Sample App
modules.description: Demo application with controllers, LiveViews, and the Todo capstone project

flows.name: HTTP Request Lifecycle
flows.description: Traces a GET request from Cowboy through middleware pipeline, router dispatch, controller action, template render, and response

flows.name: LiveView Mount & Event
flows.description: Traces WebSocket connection, LiveView mount, initial render with statics+dynamics, and a user click event through to DOM patch

flows.name: Router Macro Expansion
flows.description: Shows how `use Ignite.Router`, `get`, `scope`, `resources`, and `finalize_routes` macros compile into pattern-matching dispatch functions

flows.name: PubSub Broadcast
flows.description: Traces a PubSub broadcast from one LiveView through :pg process groups to all subscribers, triggering re-renders

flows.name: Fine-Grained Diffing Pipeline
flows.description: Traces how ~L and ~F sigils compile templates into statics/dynamics at compile time, and how the engine produces sparse diffs at runtime
